title: Plasplug HW124 Single Hook - White
features: Ideal for hollow doors and partitions
Suitable for home, boat and caravan
Triple point integral fixing and screw
description: Product Description This Plasplug multi-purpose single door hook is ideal for hollow doors and partitions. In addition, it is also suitable for boats and caravans. Supplied with a triple-point integral fixing and screw. Comes complete with a drill guide.Recommended drill bit size: 8.5mm. Founded in 1970, Plasplugs' first product was the General Purpose wall plug, the first plastic plug to sell effectively in the market place. Today, Plasplugs still manufacture plastic plugs, but has extended its portfolio to include fasteners, tiling tools, knives, abrasives, electrical products and power tools. Their mission is to make difficult jobs easier. Renowned for innovation, Plasplugs invests considerably in research and design, frequently launching new products. The newest and most exciting product is the Diamond Wheel Tile Cutter. Its unique water recycling system avoids hazardous water spillage and allows water to be re-used- no more constant refilling. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Legal Disclaimer 5 Manufacturer's Description Plasplug White Single Hook For hollow doors and partitions, the hook has an integral screw and plug for extra strong fixing. Drill Size 8.5mm. Card of 1. Box Contains 1 x white single hook;1 x triple point integral fixing;1 x screw;1 x drill guide See more

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Hanging coats, keys, towels, or other items in various settings such as homes, boats, caravans, and partitions
